creator: martys1oi@att.net
text:
OS FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE-p4 amd64
Port devel/ninja 1.11.1,2 (downloaded via Git)

Hello,

When running the build using Portmaster or via make install clean, I get a compile error for src/browse.cc that stops the build. The error is:

Fatal error __string/char_traits.h file not found

/usr/include/c++/v1/stringview:220:10: 

#include <__string/char_traits.h>

Please review. Thanks.

Regards, Marty
